---
title: "Appendix D: Glossary, Excel Terms and Their R Equivalents"
appendix: true
---

## Glossary

| Term | Meaning |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| data frame | A table-like structure used in R for rows and columns of data |
| join | A way to combine two tables using a shared key |
| tidy data | A clean data structure where each row is one observation and each column is one variable |
| script | A saved sequence of instructions you can run again |
| reproducibility | Getting the same result from the same process |
| vectorized operation | Applying a rule to a whole column at once rather than cell by cell |

Placeholder for expanded glossary.
